ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week when the transaction occurred */,
  "sales_depot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales depot where the transaction took place */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel used for the transaction */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route used for the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sales_unit" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "returns_unit" INTEGER /* Number of units returned */,
  "returns" REAL /* Total return amount */,
  "adjusted_demand" INTEGER /* Adjusted demand after accounting for returns */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sales_depot_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_depot_id") REFERENCES sales_depots ("depot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_depots" (
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales depot */,
  "depot_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales depot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sales depot */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the depot */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the depot manager */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the depot */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the depot is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the depot is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the depot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the channel */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales depot associated with the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the route */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the route */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the route */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the route was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the route was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_depot_id FOREIGN KEY ("depot_id") REFERENCES sales_depots ("depot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., Individual, Business) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the client is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the client is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the client */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "pieces" INTEGER /* Number of pieces per unit */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sub-category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES product_sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product sub-category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sub-category */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the sub-category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sub-category was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sub-category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales depot */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "min_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum reorder level */,
  "max_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Maximum reorder level */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the inventory record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the inventory record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_depot_id FOREIGN KEY ("depot_id") REFERENCES sales_depots ("depot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory transaction */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales depot */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., stock in, stock out) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the driver is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the driver is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the driver */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the driver */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the driver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the driver was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the driver was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Number of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vehicle */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, inventory analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the access log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales depot */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., Individual, Business) */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "total_returns" REAL /* Total return amount */,
  "adjusted_demand" INTEGER /* Adjusted demand */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the performance data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the performance record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance record was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_depot_id FOREIGN KEY ("depot_id") REFERENCES sales_depots ("depot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_client_type FOREIGN KEY ("client_type") REFERENCES clients ("client_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
